generated: casting audit; NOT wired to runtime. Anchor96 is the OW style source. Where a game creature has no Anchor96 counterpart, either (A) manually cast to an Anchor96 entity, or (B) generate a new Anchor96-style OW from its approved battle/source art. Default for Drifella Source Checks is (B).
